# Fra-Ber Spumone Self Car Pre-Wash Detergent and All-Purpose Degreaser

Images:
- https://shop.fra-ber.it/cdn/shop/files/prodotto-di-prelavaggio-auto-e-detergente-spumone-self-fra-ber_84f4fb6a-cf91-44e2-ab84-36dcd9a36814.jpg?v=1708427136
- https://shop.fra-ber.it/cdn/shop/files/spumone-self-modo-d-uso-1.jpg?v=1708427186
- https://shop.fra-ber.it/cdn/shop/files/spumone-self-modo-d-uso-2.jpg?v=1708427186
- https://shop.fra-ber.it/cdn/shop/files/spumone-self-modo-d-uso-3.jpg?v=1708427186
- https://shop.fra-ber.it/cdn/shop/files/spumone-self-modo-d-uso-4.jpg?v=1708427186
- https://shop.fra-ber.it/cdn/shop/files/spumone-self-modo-d-uso-5.jpg?v=1708427186
- https://shop.fra-ber.it/cdn/shop/files/spumone-self-modo-d-uso-6.jpg?v=1708427186
- https://shop.fra-ber.it/cdn/shop/files/spumone-self-modo-d-uso-7.jpg?v=1708427186
- https://shop.fra-ber.it/cdn/shop/files/spumone-self-modo-d-uso-8.jpg?v=1708427186
- https://shop.fra-ber.it/cdn/shop/files/spumone-self-modo-d-uso-9.jpg?v=1708427186
- https://shop.fra-ber.it/cdn/shop/files/spumone-self-modo-d-uso-10.jpg?v=1708427186
- https://shop.fra-ber.it/cdn/shop/files/spumone-self-1-l-indicazioni-sicurezza-1.jpg?v=1708427186

Price: €11,79
Format: 1 L
Delivery usually in 3-5 days

### THE BENEFITS OF SPUMONE SELF

Spumone Self by Fra-Ber is a super-powerful detergent and all-purpose degreaser that can also be used as a pre-wash for cars and industrial and commercial vehicles.

Main features:
- Extra-strong professional degreaser: its high cleaning power makes it ideal for use on stubborn and difficult-to-remove dirt;
- Suitable as a pre-wash: it can be applied to vehicles to eliminate smog, traffic film and gnats;
- Suitable for industrial use: it is ideal for cleaning grease and oil, making it a valuable ally for cleaning mechanical parts, engines or workshop and industrial floors;
- Concentrated: the product has a high concentration of active substances and is sold as a concentrate to be diluted before use, with 1 L of product yielding up to 50 L of ready-to-use solution;
- Suitable for all vehicles: it can be used on all types of vehicles including sports cars, utility vehicles, vans, camper vans, trucks and tractors.

### SPUMONE SELF IS IDEAL
- To save time and effort when cleaning particularly dirty vehicles, removing the toughest dirt without touching the vehicle;
- To clean heavy machinery and stubborn dirt such as grease and oil, using a single product;
- For use in machine or body shops to clean tools, floors, machinery or even motors.

### HOW TO USE SPUMONE SELF

We recommend using Spumone Self as both a degreaser for stubborn dirt and as a pre-wash prior to shampooing.

The dilution ratios change depending on the selected method of use.

As a degreaser for stubborn and built-up dirt:
- Spray on the surface and leave on for a few minutes;
- Rinse with a damp cloth.

As a pre-wash:
- On vertical surfaces, apply the product from the bottom up, thus avoiding vertical dripping when rinsing;
- Apply evenly on the parts to be treated;
- Rinse with plenty of water and dry.

For pre-washing with a pressure spray pump: dilute to a ratio between 1:25 and 1:50, i.e., use between 40 ml and 20 ml of product and top up with water (between 960 ml and 980 ml) to obtain a 1 L ready-to-use solution.

For pre-washing with a foam gun and foam lance: dilute to a ratio between 1:2 and 1:3, i.e., use between 330 ml and 250 ml of product and top up with water (between 675 ml and 750 ml) to obtain a 1 L ready-to-use solution. During application, the actual dilution may reach between roughly 1:45 and 1:60.

As a degreaser on stubborn dirt and as a concentrated pre-wash spray on gnats: use in a graduated trigger bottle diluted to a ratio of 1:9, i.e., use 100 ml of product and top up with water (900 ml) to obtain a 1 L ready-to-use solution;

Precautions: Do not allow the product to dry and do not apply in the sun and on hot or delicate surfaces. The product can be applied on dry bodywork, however, during the summer or in extremely hot regions, it is recommended to rinse the car first to lower its temperature and prevent it from drying during application.

### SAFETY INFO & DATA SHEET

PRODUCT CODE: 700387 - R: 15 SPUMONE SELF 1 L

SAFETY INFORMATION:
Hazard pictogram: https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/0566/8850/9136/files/Simboli_pericolo_5.png?v=1698148518

DANGER
H314 Causes severe skin burns and eye damage.
P101 If medical advice is needed, have product container or label at hand.
P102 Keep out of reach of children.
P103 Read carefully and follow all instructions.
P280 Wear protective gloves/protective clothing/eye protection/face protection.
P301+P330+P331 IF SWALLOWED: rinse mouth. DO NOT induce vomiting.
P303+P361+P353 IN CASE OF CONTACT WITH SKIN (or hair): immediately take off all contaminated clothing. Rinse skin with water/shower.
P305+P351+P338 IN CASE OF CONTACT WITH THE EYES: rinse carefully with water for several minutes. Remove contact lenses if present and easy to do. Keep on rinsing.
P310 Immediately contact the Poison Centre
P405 Store locked up.
P501 Dispose of product/container in accordance with regulations.

Contains: SODIUM HYDROXIDE, ETHANOLAMINE, cocamidopropil betaina.
Contains among other ingredients: Less than 5%: Phosphonates, EDTA and salts thereof, Cationic surfactants, Anionic surfactants, Amphoteric surfactants, Non-ionic surfactants. Perfume (Benzyl Benzoate).

Data sheet download: https://fraberantegnate-my.sharepoint.com/:b:/g/personal/onedrive_fra-ber_it/EZmG4csXMM1JmURfk84LCdgBXckDmPvAC0iLL_M6VYZgKg?e=slX4bg
